title: GED/High School Equivalency Test Instruction * Hispanic/Latino Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Education > GED/High School Equivalency Test Instruction * Hispanic/Latino Community 2 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Hispanic/Latino Community Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ADELANTE MUJERES ADULT EDUCATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a holistic education program for Latina women working towards a GED, including coursework in English Language Development (ELD), mathematics, grammar, parenting, and an 18-week seminar focused on conflict resolution (ESPERE). The Early Childhood Education program provides preschool and child care for participants' children. 2030 Main Street Suite A Forest Grove, OR 97116 Eligibility: Low-income Spanish-speaking women and their children, ages 6 weeks-5 years Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Classes are held 5 days per week for a full year Email (503) 992-0078 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CENTRO CULTURAL OF WASHINGTON COUNTY CENTRO DE PROSPERIDAD HILLSBORO ADULT BASIC EDUCATION, JOB SEARCH, AND BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers educational programs to individuals who are seeking to improve employability. Programs include GED tutoring and computer literacy. Also assists clients in attaining job readiness through job application assistance, interview preparation, resume building and locating internship and on the job training (OJT) opportunities. Business development services are offered at no cost to those who wish to start their own business and to existing small business owners who wish to improve business practices. 265 SE Oak Street Suite A Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-noon Email (503) 368-9895 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ADELANTE MUJERES ADULT EDUCATION PROGRAM CENTRO CULTURAL OF WASHINGTON COUNTY ADULT BASIC EDUCATION, JOB SEARCH, AND BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT
